heading: Assignment of space in Senate Office Building
label: 2024 Assignment of space in Senate Office Building
text: On and after , the assignment of rooms and other space in the Senate Office Building shall be under the direction and control of the Senate Committee on Rules and Administration and shall not be a part of the duties of the Architect of the Capitol.June 8, 1942
notes: CodificationSection was classified to section 174d of former Title 40, prior to the enactment of Title 40, Public Buildings, Property, and Works, by , , .Pub. L. 107–217, § 1116 Stat. 1062Aug. 21, 2002
Amendments1946—Act , substituted “Committee on Rules and Administration” for “Committee on Rules”.Aug. 2, 1946

Effective Date of 1946 Amendment, , provided that section 102 of that act shall take effect on , and section 245 of title II of that act, , provided that section 224 thereof shall “take effect on the day on which the Eightieth Congress convenes”. The Eightieth Congress convened on .Act Aug. 2, 1946, ch. 753, title I, § 14260 Stat. 83460 Stat. 839Jan. 2, 1947Jan. 3, 1947
